_about: Orchestrator behavior config — READ THIS AT THE START OF EVERY ORCHESTRATOR SESSION. These values govern how plans are authored and how code-changing work is executed. Each setting is an object {value, options?, description} so the file stays valid JSON while documenting itself. Machine- or ecosystem-specific overrides go in orchestrator.config.local.json (gitignored), which shallow-merges over this file (local wins).

plan_format.description: Format for NEW plans. 'html' -> copy plans/_template.html and link pages-design-system.css. 'md' -> copy plans/_template.md (YAML frontmatter title/status/created/updated/goal). Both templates lead with a human-only summary and the plan flow ends with a kickoff prompt — see guides/plan-authoring.md. Existing plans of EITHER format remain readable regardless of this setting; do not batch-convert.

execution_mode.description: How code-changing steps run. 'pr' = worktree + feature branch + push + open PR + report URL, pausing for human review between waves. 'autonomous' = same worktree/PR flow but the orchestrator implements, commits, pushes and opens the PR without pausing for per-step approval (still reports URLs). 'direct' = commit straight to the working branch with no worktree/PR (only for throwaway or local-only repos).

base_branch.description: Branch that new work forks from and that PRs target. Override per-ecosystem in orchestrator.config.local.json (e.g. work repos may use 'main').

use_worktrees.description: When true, every code change happens in an isolated git worktree at <repo>/.worktrees/<branch>. Ignored when execution_mode = 'direct'.

remove_worktree_after_pr.description: Remove the worktree as soon as the PR URL is captured. Never delete the remote branch (the PR owns it; GitHub deletes it on merge).

auto_commit.description: true = commit completed work without asking. false = stage changes and ask before committing.

auto_push.description: true = push to origin without asking. false = ask before any push (pushing is an outward-facing action).

require_review.description: When true, a reviewer agent (prompts/reviewer.md) must pass before a step is marked complete.

require_tests_pass.description: Quality gate: tests must pass (and new tests added when behavior changed) before a step is reported complete.

require_ci_green.description: Quality gate: a pushed branch's CI must be green before reporting the step complete.

executor_model.description: Default model for delegated executor sub-agents. Escalate to 'opus' for high-complexity steps.

plan_index_autobuild.description: Regenerate plans/INDEX.md via scripts/build-plan-index.py whenever plans are added, renamed, or change status.

handover_threshold_pct.description: Context-usage percent at which — after a natural stopping point — the orchestrator writes a handover (/create-handover) and stops.

personal_overlay.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the gitignored ecosystem-specific instruction overlay loaded IN ADDITION to CLAUDE.md. Absent on a fresh clone — each user/machine writes their own; see README.md.
